home.heroDesc: Serving humanity through animal rescue, emergency medical assistance, ambulance services, shelter support, and volunteer coordination.
home.missionTitle: Dedicated to Protecting Every Innocent Soul
home.missionDesc1: Hum Hai Hindu Foundation is deeply dedicated to protecting injured and abandoned animals by providing rapid emergency rescue services, direct medical assistance, specialized animal ambulances, and rehab shelter support.
home.missionDesc2: We operate across key spiritual zones and cities, ensuring that cows, street dogs, monkeys, birds, and other animals are never left to suffer. Our platform integrates citizens, quick rescue teams, and expert veterinarians into a single cohesive dispatch network.
home.shelterDesc: Over 1,200 animals are currently undergoing rehabilitation in our Varanasi and Ayodhya shelters.
home.methodADesc: Pay instantly from any banking app like GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM.
home.methodBDesc: Scan with GPay · PhonePe · BHIM · Paytm
home.thankYouDonation: Thank you! Payment was received successfully. God Bless Your Kindness!
home.transactionSuccessful: Transaction successful. Your help saves lives!
home.footerDesc: Serving humanity through animal rescue, emergency medical assistance, ambulance services, shelter support, and volunteer coordination.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Hum Hai Hindu Foundation. By accessing our platform, making donations, or reporting emergency rescue cases, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions.
terms.section1Desc: Hum Hai Hindu Foundation operates as a registered non-governmental organization (NGO) providing rapid street animal rescue, medical treatments, animal ambulance transport, and permanent shelter recovery services. Our platforms connect citizen reporters with active dispatch rescue teams.
terms.section2Desc: All financial contributions, whether via UPI, QR scan, direct bank transfer, or crypto (USDT TRC20) are voluntary and utilized entirely for animal care, feed supply, medical aid, and shelter operations. Under special offline verification forms, admins audit transaction snapshots to maintain a transparent public ledger. Donations are non-refundable once verified.
terms.section3Desc: When reporting stray animal emergencies under Event 112, users must submit truthful incident descriptions, correct GPS coordinates, and factual photo/video evidence. Intentional fake reporting, spamming the dispatch network, or overloading the emergency system will lead to account termination and legal accountability.
terms.section4Desc: Our dispatch networks and rescue coordinates rely on cellular connectivity and volunteer availability. While our Saffron units strive for instant dispatch, we do not guarantee immediate response timelines for all reported incidents and accept no liability for operations delayed by external traffic or force majeure.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Hum Hai Hindu Foundation values your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, process, and secure user information, citizen rescue telemetry, and offline audit payment data.
privacy.section1Desc: We collect donor information (name, mobile number, email, purpose of donation), uploaded payment proof snapshots, emergency rescue ticket details (animal type, location coordinates, incident photos), and user account profile credentials.
privacy.section2Desc: Data is processed to dispatch Saffron active teams, coordinate rescue operations with nearby veterinarians, verify offline financial contributions, maintain transparent public ledger records, and compile statistics on regional animal welfare.
privacy.section3Desc: Your coordinate telemetry, profile mobile numbers, and audit files are stored securely. Payment screenshots and transaction details are only accessible to certified NGO admins inside the audited ledger system to prevent financial fraud.
privacy.section4Desc: We do not sell or rent user personal data to third-party commercial networks. Telemetry coordinates are shared solely with authorized emergency rescue dispatch units and nearby shelter centers during active rescue operations.
